case_title: LINDA C ULRICH VS. DATING HOLDING LLC et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELLE MCGILL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIE, EXCEPT DEFENDANT LYNNE YANEMOTO. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MARC PAIVA--CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ULRICH, LINDA C IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DATING HOLDING LLC D.B.A. TABLE  4 SIX YANEMOTO, LYNNE PAIVA, MARK H STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.00 FILED BY ULRICH, LINDA C AS TO DEFENDANT DATING HOLDING LLC D.B.A. TABLE  4 SIX YANEMOTO, LYNNE PAIVA, MARK H ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2012 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $65.00. SERVED OCT-03-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DATING HOLDING LLC D.B.A. TABLE  4 SIX
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85.00. SERVED OCT-02-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YANEMOTO, LYNNE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $ 95.00. SERVED OCT-03-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAIVA, MARK H
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHELLE MCGILL FILED BY ULRICH, LINDA C DATING HOLDING LLC D.B.A. TABLE  4 SIX PAIVA, MARK H
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DATING HOLDING LLC D.B.A. TABLE  4 SIX
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2012 - JUDGMENT.
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS -NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ; UNABLE TO FORWARD - SENT TO DEFENDANT
